chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-6009 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.26665/2024. 2. For orders on CMA No.26666/2024. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 17.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Faisal Gulfam, advocate undertakes to file power on behalf of respondent No.2 on the next date. It is jointly submitted that the Petition may be disposed of in the following terms: i. That the petitioner has filed applications before respondent Nos.2 & 3 as available at Page 175-179. ii. These applications are to be decided by the respondent Nos.2 to 4. iii. The said respondents shall provide an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and decide these applications expeditiously, preferably, within three days. iv. Applications shall be determined vide a speaking order leaving the parties at liberty to assail the same before appropriate forum, if aggrieved. The Petition is disposed of accordingly. Learned counsel for the respondent-department undertakes to ensure that the order is communicated to the respondents for timely compliance. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
